/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_pan_detection_only.dir/unity/unity.c.o CMakeFiles/test_pan_detection_only.dir/pan_detect_logic.c.o CMakeFiles/test_pan_detection_only.dir/test_pan_detection.c.o CMakeFiles/test_pan_detection_only.dir/test_main_pan_detection.c.o -o test_pan_detection_only  -lm
